combos.notes: Juri's confirms are relatively straightforward. Some lights may have to be cut depending on distance.
Very common medium route
Basic jump-in with typical heavy structure that allows for flexible ender
PC DI combo that also works on blocked DIs and wallsplats
Basic reversal punish combo; cancelling directly into 236HK is more optimal for SA3 cancel specifically

Very important to both her combos and pressure game. 5LK can be used instead but has fewer options afterwards and lower damage in exchange for being faster (and not trading with 4f buttons like 2MP would).
Not very common, but good to know regardless. Juri doesn't get much out of max range 5LK.
Juri's light chain structure is pretty similar to most of the cast. At farther ranges, she has to use 5LK to end her chain.
Juri has to be point blank for this link to work, but 5MK(1) has more than enough hitstun to combo into 236MK and 214HK for extended follow-ups.
Juri doesn't get anything particularly amazing on counter-hit.
Juri has to be point blank for this to work.
Great starter for Juri. 5HP has a lot of hitstun, which lets her go for her most damaging cancel options and Drive Rush.
Decent against moves like Jamie's palm.
Excellent way to route into moves that are normally only accessible by heavy starters
Good for punishing spaced moves like sweeps
Midscreen route for damage off juggle activation.
Midscreen route for okizeme. 5HK > 2HP also works but does slightly less damage.
Corner combo optimized for damage.
Corner route to immediately enter into a 50/50.
Advancing OD activation route.
Advancing OD activation route that focuses on corner carry.
Route that works anywhere on the screen off grounded activation. 5MK and 6MP are mostly interchangeable
Midscreen stock positive safe jump route. 4HK(1) is more consistent than 2HP further away but does much less damage, 2310 compared to 1990.
Midscreen route for corner carry. 6MP is much more consistent here than 5MK.
Corner combo optimized for damage.
Corner route to immediately enter into a 50/50. It's really that simple.
Corner-to-corner combo. Can go into 50/50 routing if close enough to the corner.
Easy and quick stock gain combo, works from pretty much any light starter.
Corner version of the above combo. The additional height from 5HP's launch lets this combo work.
Must first use a medium to route into the BnB. 623HP ender adds ~300 damage.

combos.combo: ... 6MP > 2HP > jc j.MP > j214KK~dl.K, DR~5MP > 4HK > 2HP > jc j.MP > j.MK > j214K~K
combos.notes: Alternative corner-to-corner route off lights. DR extension is finicky depending on height.
Essentially the FSE BnB because of the 236HK launch which gives the choice of oki, damage, and a super.
A shorter version of the above combo. Can add 623HP ender in the corner.
623PP ender only works in the corner. Auto-times slightly meaty 5MP.
Stock neutral DP punish that leads to safe jump. Can link into 623HP or 236236K to sacrifice safe jump.
Neutral buffer that is safe to Drive Impact and also pulls Juri closer to the opponent on block.
Buffer in neutral from heavies. Can substitute 214MK for 214LK to allow 623HP ender in the corner.
Does not work as easily from further distances. 623HP ender does not work on PC 5HK.
Heavy punish starter. Can choose between damage or safe jump with 623HP ender.
Typical heavy punish starter with stocks.
High damage DP/Super punish.
Looping corner 50/50 setup. Works from any hit in the corner, even lights.

combos.combo: DI 6MP > 5MK > 4HK > 2HP > jc j.MP > j.MK > j.HP > j.HK
combos.notes: Way to access 50/50 if DI wallsplats, works on hit and on block.
